entities.name: dry-run
entities.context: A boolean flag for previewing operations without creating files; default is false

entities.name: N5/scripts/
entities.context: Directory where digest scripts are stored; named [digest_name].py

entities.name: N5/commands/
entities.context: Directory where command documentation is stored; named [digest-name].md

entities.name: commands.jsonl
entities.context: System file for registering commands; updated when digest is registered

entities.name: Digest System
entities.context: A system for creating automated digests with defined phases: Discovery, Design, Implementation, Testing

entities.name: Discovery Phase
entities.context: First phase where requirements are gathered; failure mode is unclear requirements

entities.name: Design Phase
entities.context: Second phase for planning outputs; failure mode is output location conflicts

entities.name: Implementation Phase
entities.context: Third phase for building the digest; failure mode is unavailable data sources

entities.name: Testing Phase
entities.context: Final phase for validation; failure mode is fresh thread test failures

relationships.context: Discovery is the first phase of the digest system workflow
Design follows Discovery in the digest system workflow
Implementation follows Design in the digest system workflow
Testing is the final phase of the digest system workflow
The digest system uses dry-run flag for preview functionality
Scripts are stored in N5/scripts/ directory
Command docs are stored in N5/commands/ directory
Commands are registered in commands.jsonl when applicable
Primary failure mode: requirements are ambiguous
Primary failure mode: path conflicts with existing files
Primary failure mode: data source inaccessible or missing credentials
Primary failure mode: tests fail due to missing context
